bookmarks.title: Printables — 3D Model Repository
bookmarks.excerpt: Community-driven 3D model repository by Prusa. Download free STL and 3MF files for your 3D printer, share your designs, and earn rewards.
bookmarks.note: Best model quality overall — check here first

bookmarks.title: Thingiverse — Digital Designs for Physical Objects
bookmarks.excerpt: One of the largest 3D printing communities with millions of free downloadable designs for makers, hobbyists, and educators.

bookmarks.title: MakerWorld — Bambu Lab Community
bookmarks.excerpt: Bambu Lab's model-sharing platform with profiles optimized for Bambu printers. Includes pre-sliced downloads and multicolor projects.
bookmarks.note: Pre-sliced profiles for X1C — saves tons of time

bookmarks.title: r/3Dprinting — Reddit Community
bookmarks.excerpt: Active Reddit community for 3D printing enthusiasts sharing prints, troubleshooting tips, and news about printers and materials.

bookmarks.title: Teaching Tech 3D Printer Calibration
bookmarks.excerpt: Step-by-step 3D printer calibration guide covering e-steps, flow rate, temperature towers, retraction, pressure advance, and dimensional accuracy.

bookmarks.title: All3DP — 3D Printing Magazine
bookmarks.excerpt: Online magazine covering 3D printing news, reviews, guides, and tutorials for hobbyists and professionals.

bookmarks.title: Thangs — 3D Model Search Engine
bookmarks.excerpt: Geometric search engine for 3D models. Search across Thingiverse, Printables, MyMiniFactory and more from one place.
bookmarks.note: Searches multiple repos at once

bookmarks.title: MyMiniFactory — Curated STL Files
bookmarks.excerpt: Curated platform for 3D printable models. Every model is tested and guaranteed printable before being listed.

bookmarks.title: 3D Printer Academy — YouTube
bookmarks.excerpt: Beginner-friendly 3D printing tutorials covering slicer settings, first layer tips, and troubleshooting common print failures.

bookmarks.title: CNC Kitchen — 3D Print Testing
bookmarks.excerpt: Engineering-focused 3D printing channel. Rigorous material testing, strength comparisons, and deep dives into print settings.
bookmarks.note: Best data-driven print testing on YouTube

bookmarks.title: Maker's Muse — YouTube
bookmarks.excerpt: Australian maker channel covering 3D printing, design tips, product reviews, and creative projects.

bookmarks.title: Prusa Knowledge Base
bookmarks.excerpt: Prusa Research support portal with assembly guides, firmware docs, troubleshooting trees, and print quality reference photos.
bookmarks.note: Useful even for non-Prusa printers

bookmarks.title: 3DPrintBeginner — Guides & Reviews
bookmarks.excerpt: In-depth 3D printer reviews, upgrade guides, and Klipper firmware tutorials for budget and prosumer machines.

bookmarks.title: Klipper Firmware
bookmarks.excerpt: High-performance 3D printer firmware running on a Raspberry Pi. Input shaping, pressure advance, and faster speeds with better quality.

bookmarks.title: Ellis' Print Tuning Guide
bookmarks.excerpt: Comprehensive print tuning guide for Klipper and Marlin covering pressure advance, extrusion multiplier, and first layer squish with visual references.
bookmarks.note: Best visual calibration guide out there

bookmarks.title: Voron Design — CoreXY Printer Kits
bookmarks.excerpt: Community-designed CoreXY 3D printer platform. Open-source designs for high-speed enclosed printers.

bookmarks.title: 3D Printing Nerd — YouTube
bookmarks.excerpt: Enthusiast 3D printing channel with printer reviews, filament tests, and community print challenges.

bookmarks.title: Simplify3D Troubleshooting Guide
bookmarks.excerpt: Visual troubleshooting guide for common 3D print quality issues with photos and solutions for stringing, warping, and more.
bookmarks.note: Fastest way to diagnose print issues visually

bookmarks.title: Matterhackers — Supplies & Guides
bookmarks.excerpt: 3D printing retailer with extensive how-to articles, material comparison charts, and printer buyer's guides.

bookmarks.title: Cults3D — Premium & Free Models
bookmarks.excerpt: 3D model marketplace with both free and premium designs. Strong selection of artistic, miniature, and functional prints.

bookmarks.title: Yeggi — 3D Printer Model Search
bookmarks.excerpt: Search engine for 3D printable models aggregating results from Thingiverse, Cults, Printables, and dozens of other repositories.

bookmarks.title: Bambu Lab Wiki
bookmarks.excerpt: Official knowledge base for Bambu Lab printers. Covers setup, calibration, maintenance, firmware updates, and troubleshooting for X1C, P1, and A1 series.

bookmarks.title: OrcaSlicer — Advanced 3D Print Slicer
bookmarks.excerpt: Open-source slicer forked from Bambu Studio with advanced calibration tools, better multi-material support, and community-driven features.
bookmarks.note: Better than stock Bambu Studio for multi-color tuning

bookmarks.title: r/BambuLab — Reddit Community
bookmarks.excerpt: Reddit community dedicated to Bambu Lab printers. Firmware news, print showcases, troubleshooting, and AMS tips from X1C, P1S, and A1 owners.

bookmarks.title: 3D Printing Filament Guide — All3DP
bookmarks.excerpt: Comprehensive guide to 3D printing filament types including PLA, PETG, ABS, TPU, ASA, and specialty materials with settings and use cases.

bookmarks.title: Polymaker — Engineering Filaments
bookmarks.excerpt: Premium 3D printing filament manufacturer specializing in engineering-grade materials including PC, PA6, and their PolyTerra eco-friendly PLA line.
bookmarks.note: PolyTerra PLA is the daily driver

bookmarks.title: Filament Temperature Tower Guide
bookmarks.excerpt: How to print and read temperature towers to dial in optimal nozzle temperature for any filament. Includes slicer setup for automatic temp changes.

bookmarks.title: Fusion 360 — Autodesk
bookmarks.excerpt: Cloud-based 3D CAD/CAM/CAE tool combining industrial and mechanical design, simulation, collaboration, and machining in a single platform.
bookmarks.note: Primary CAD tool — personal use license

bookmarks.title: Blender — Free 3D Creation Suite
bookmarks.excerpt: Free and open-source 3D creation suite supporting modeling, rigging, animation, simulation, rendering, compositing, and motion tracking.
bookmarks.note: Good for organic shapes Fusion can't handle

bookmarks.title: OpenSCAD — Programmers' Solid 3D CAD Modeller
bookmarks.excerpt: Script-based 3D CAD modeller focused on the engineering aspects of design. Create 3D models using a programming language rather than interactive modeling.
bookmarks.note: Great for parametric enclosures and gridfinity

bookmarks.title: Fusion 360 for 3D Printing — Maker's Muse
bookmarks.excerpt: YouTube playlist covering Fusion 360 techniques specifically for 3D printing — tolerances, snap fits, threads, living hinges, and export settings.

bookmarks.title: GrabCAD — Free CAD Library
bookmarks.excerpt: Largest open-source CAD library with millions of free designs. Download STEP, IGES, STL files for components, hardware, and assemblies.
bookmarks.note: Great for finding reference hardware models

bookmarks.title: McMaster-Carr — Hardware Supplier & CAD Models
bookmarks.excerpt: Industrial hardware supplier with an extensive catalog. Every product includes downloadable 3D CAD models in STEP format for design integration.
bookmarks.note: Free STEP downloads — import directly into Fusion

bookmarks.title: Gridfinity — Modular Storage System
bookmarks.excerpt: Community hub for the Gridfinity modular storage system created by Zack Freedman. Parametric bins, baseplates, and accessories for workshop organization.
bookmarks.note: Printing a full set for the workbench

bookmarks.title: KiCad — Open Source EDA
bookmarks.excerpt: Free and open-source electronics design automation suite for schematic capture, PCB layout, and Gerber file generation. Full professional workflow.

bookmarks.title: JLCPCB — PCB Prototyping Service
bookmarks.excerpt: Low-cost PCB manufacturing and assembly service. Order custom PCBs starting at $2 for 5 boards with fast turnaround and SMT assembly options.

bookmarks.title: Adafruit Learning System
bookmarks.excerpt: Hundreds of detailed tutorials for electronics projects, sensors, microcontrollers, and wearables. Well-written guides with wiring diagrams and code examples.

bookmarks.title: DigiKey — Electronic Components
bookmarks.excerpt: Major electronic components distributor with millions of parts in stock. Datasheets, reference designs, and same-day shipping on most components.
bookmarks.note: Better parametric search than Mouser

bookmarks.title: ESPHome — DIY Smart Home Firmware
bookmarks.excerpt: System to control ESP8266/ESP32 microcontrollers using simple YAML configuration files and integrate directly with Home Assistant.
bookmarks.note: Running 6 custom devices on this

bookmarks.title: ESP32 Arduino Core — Espressif
bookmarks.excerpt: Official Arduino core for ESP32. Reference documentation covering GPIO, WiFi, Bluetooth, I2C, SPI, and all peripheral libraries.

bookmarks.title: Random Nerd Tutorials — ESP32 Guides
bookmarks.excerpt: Massive collection of ESP32 project tutorials covering sensors, displays, web servers, MQTT, deep sleep, and BLE with step-by-step instructions.
bookmarks.note: Go-to reference for quick ESP32 examples

bookmarks.title: WLED — Addressable LED Controller
bookmarks.excerpt: Fast and feature-rich firmware for ESP8266/ESP32 to control NeoPixel (WS2812B) and other addressable LED strips. Web UI, Home Assistant integration, and 100+ effects.

bookmarks.title: Arduino Project Hub
bookmarks.excerpt: Official Arduino project sharing platform with tutorials spanning robotics, IoT, wearables, and environmental monitoring. Includes wiring diagrams and full code.

bookmarks.title: Last Minute Engineers — Sensor Tutorials
bookmarks.excerpt: In-depth tutorials on popular electronics modules and sensors including BME280, OLED displays, relay modules, and motor drivers with Arduino and ESP32.
bookmarks.note: Best pinout diagrams I've found anywhere

bookmarks.title: PlatformIO — Embedded Development IDE
bookmarks.excerpt: Cross-platform IDE for embedded development supporting 1000+ boards. Integrates with VS Code, handles libraries and toolchains automatically.

bookmarks.title: MDN Web Docs
bookmarks.excerpt: The MDN Web Docs site provides information about Open Web technologies including HTML, CSS, and APIs for both websites and progressive web apps.

bookmarks.title: GitHub
bookmarks.excerpt: Development platform for version control and collaboration. Host and review code, manage projects, and build software alongside millions of developers.

bookmarks.title: Stack Overflow
bookmarks.excerpt: Largest online community for developers to learn, share knowledge, and troubleshoot coding problems across every programming language.

bookmarks.title: Regex101 — Online Regex Tester
bookmarks.excerpt: Online regex tester and debugger with syntax highlighting, match details, and support for PCRE, Python, JavaScript, and Golang flavors.

bookmarks.title: Flask — Python Micro Web Framework
bookmarks.excerpt: Lightweight WSGI web application framework for Python. Simple core with extensive extension ecosystem for databases, auth, and APIs.
bookmarks.note: Using for Raindrop Dash backend

bookmarks.title: FastAPI — Modern Python Web Framework
bookmarks.excerpt: High-performance web framework for building APIs with Python based on standard type hints. Auto-generates OpenAPI docs.

bookmarks.title: Real Python — Tutorials & Guides
bookmarks.excerpt: Python tutorials, articles, and courses for all skill levels. Covers web dev, data science, automation, and best practices with practical examples.

bookmarks.title: Tailwind CSS
bookmarks.excerpt: Utility-first CSS framework for rapidly building custom user interfaces without leaving your HTML. Highly composable design system.

bookmarks.title: CSS-Tricks — Tips, Tricks, and Techniques
bookmarks.excerpt: Web design and development resource with guides on CSS, HTML, JavaScript, and modern web techniques. Includes the famous Flexbox and Grid guides.

bookmarks.title: Vite — Next Generation Frontend Tooling
bookmarks.excerpt: Build tool that provides a faster and leaner development experience for modern web projects. Lightning fast HMR and optimized builds.

bookmarks.title: Ana White — Free Furniture Plans
bookmarks.excerpt: Hundreds of free DIY furniture plans with step-by-step instructions, cut lists, and material estimates. Beginner-friendly to advanced projects.

bookmarks.title: Woodworking for Mere Mortals — YouTube
bookmarks.excerpt: Approachable woodworking channel focused on projects anyone can build with basic tools. Weekly project videos with free downloadable plans.

bookmarks.title: The Wood Database — Wood Species Info
bookmarks.excerpt: Comprehensive database of wood species with properties, workability ratings, grain patterns, and identification guides for hundreds of domestic and exotic woods.
bookmarks.note: Best reference for comparing wood properties

bookmarks.title: Rockler — Woodworking Hardware & Supplies
bookmarks.excerpt: Specialty woodworking retailer with hardware, jigs, project plans, and supplies. Extensive selection of drawer slides, hinges, and specialty fasteners.

bookmarks.title: Instructables — DIY Projects
bookmarks.excerpt: Community platform for sharing DIY projects across woodworking, electronics, crafts, cooking, and more. Step-by-step photo guides with materials lists.

bookmarks.title: Matthias Wandel — Woodworking & Engineering
bookmarks.excerpt: Engineering-minded woodworking projects including homemade tools, jigs, and machines. Unique blend of precision woodworking and mechanical problem-solving.
bookmarks.note: The gear generators are incredible

bookmarks.title: Coolors — Color Palette Generator
bookmarks.excerpt: Fast color palette generator with thousands of trending palettes. Export to CSS, SVG, PDF, or share directly. Lock colors and generate complementary schemes.

bookmarks.title: Unsplash — Free High-Resolution Photos
bookmarks.excerpt: Beautiful free images and photos contributed by creators worldwide. No attribution required for most uses.

bookmarks.title: SVG Repo — Free SVG Icons & Vectors
bookmarks.excerpt: 500,000+ open-licensed SVG vectors and icons. Searchable, customizable colors, and ready for web projects or cutting machines.
bookmarks.note: Good for laser cutter and vinyl projects too

bookmarks.title: Canva — Online Design Platform
bookmarks.excerpt: Graphic design platform for creating social media graphics, presentations, posters, labels, and other visual content with drag-and-drop tools.
bookmarks.note: Quick label maker for 3D printed parts

bookmarks.title: Google Fonts
bookmarks.excerpt: Library of free and open-source font families optimized for the web. Browse, test, and download fonts for use in print and digital projects.

bookmarks.title: Home Assistant
bookmarks.excerpt: Open-source home automation platform focused on local control and privacy. Integrates with over 2000 devices and services.
bookmarks.note: The hub of everything

bookmarks.title: Awesome Self-Hosted — GitHub List
bookmarks.excerpt: Curated list of self-hostable software and services. Categorized directory covering everything from analytics to wikis with deployment info.
bookmarks.note: Rabbit hole warning — budget your time

bookmarks.title: Raindrop Dash — Self-Hosted Bookmark Dashboard
bookmarks.excerpt: A self-hosted bookmark dashboard powered by your Raindrop.io account. Browse, search, and manage bookmarks from any browser including mobile.
bookmarks.note: This very dashboard!

bookmarks.title: r/selfhosted — Reddit Community
bookmarks.excerpt: Active community for self-hosting enthusiasts sharing setups, troubleshooting, and discovering new applications to run on your own hardware.

bookmarks.title: Portainer — Container Management UI
bookmarks.excerpt: Lightweight management UI for Docker, Kubernetes, and Swarm environments. Deploy, manage, and troubleshoot containers through a web interface.

bookmarks.title: Immich — Self-Hosted Photo Backup
bookmarks.excerpt: High-performance self-hosted photo and video management with mobile backup, facial recognition, and sharing.

bookmarks.title: Vaultwarden — Bitwarden in Rust
bookmarks.excerpt: Lightweight Bitwarden-compatible server written in Rust. Runs on minimal hardware with full client compatibility.

bookmarks.title: Paperless-ngx — Document Management
bookmarks.excerpt: Scan, index, and archive physical documents with OCR and full-text search.

bookmarks.title: Nextcloud — Self-Hosted Cloud
bookmarks.excerpt: Self-hosted productivity platform with file sync, calendars, contacts, and office suite. Full Google Workspace alternative.

bookmarks.title: Homepage — Dashboard for Homelab
bookmarks.excerpt: Modern application dashboard with integrations for 100+ services. Widget-based YAML config.

bookmarks.title: Traefik — Cloud Native Reverse Proxy
bookmarks.excerpt: Modern reverse proxy with automatic HTTPS via Let's Encrypt. Native Docker and Kubernetes integration.

bookmarks.title: Nginx Proxy Manager
bookmarks.excerpt: Simple web UI for managing Nginx reverse proxy hosts with free SSL via Let's Encrypt.

bookmarks.title: Wireguard — Fast VPN Tunnel
bookmarks.excerpt: Extremely simple yet fast modern VPN using state-of-the-art cryptography. Built into the Linux kernel.

bookmarks.title: Tailscale — Zero Config VPN
bookmarks.excerpt: Mesh VPN built on WireGuard. Zero config, works through firewalls and NAT.

bookmarks.title: Plex — Media Server
bookmarks.excerpt: Personal media server for organizing and streaming movies, TV, music, and photos to any device.
bookmarks.note: Running 3 instances for different sources

bookmarks.title: Jellyfin — Free Media System
bookmarks.excerpt: Free and open-source media server. No premium tier or tracking — volunteer-built Plex alternative.

bookmarks.title: Pi-hole — Network-Wide Ad Blocking
bookmarks.excerpt: Network-level ad and tracker blocker acting as a DNS sinkhole. Protects all devices without client software.

bookmarks.title: AdGuard Home — DNS Ad Blocker
bookmarks.excerpt: Network-wide DNS-based ad and tracker blocker with web dashboard, parental controls, and DoH support.

bookmarks.title: Authentik — Identity Provider
bookmarks.excerpt: Open-source identity provider with SSO, MFA, and user management. Supports SAML, OAuth2, LDAP, and SCIM.

bookmarks.title: Dockge — Docker Compose Manager
bookmarks.excerpt: Self-hosted Docker Compose manager with a reactive web UI. From the creator of Uptime Kuma.
bookmarks.note: From the Uptime Kuma creator

bookmarks.title: TechnoTim — Homelab YouTube
bookmarks.excerpt: Homelab and self-hosting YouTube channel covering Proxmox, Docker, Kubernetes, and infrastructure automation.

bookmarks.title: r/homelab — Reddit Community
bookmarks.excerpt: Reddit community for homelab enthusiasts sharing rack setups, hardware deals, and self-hosted service recommendations.

bookmarks.title: Proxmox VE Documentation
bookmarks.excerpt: Official documentation for Proxmox Virtual Environment covering installation, clustering, VM and container management, storage, and networking.

bookmarks.title: Docker Docs — Container Platform
bookmarks.excerpt: Official Docker documentation covering container building, Compose files, networking, volumes, and multi-container application deployment.

bookmarks.title: Ansible Documentation
bookmarks.excerpt: Official Ansible docs covering playbooks, roles, modules, and inventory management for IT automation and configuration management.

bookmarks.title: Uptime Kuma — Self-Hosted Monitoring
bookmarks.excerpt: Self-hosted monitoring tool supporting HTTP(s), TCP, Ping, DNS, and more. Clean UI with notifications via Slack, Telegram, email, and 90+ integrations.

bookmarks.title: UniFi — Ubiquiti Network Management
bookmarks.excerpt: Ubiquiti's enterprise-grade networking platform for managing switches, access points, security gateways, and cameras through a unified controller.

bookmarks.title: Grafana — Observability Dashboard
bookmarks.excerpt: Open-source analytics and monitoring platform. Create dashboards from Prometheus, InfluxDB, Loki, and dozens of other data sources.
